tasks.prompt: Fix a CLI JSON output regression and verify the command returns parseable JSON.
tasks.expected: CLI emits parseable JSON.

tasks.prompt: Handle empty workflow graphs without crashing centrality calculations.
tasks.expected: Empty graph analysis returns a stable result.

tasks.prompt: Validate trace events with missing source fields and report a clear error.
tasks.expected: Trace ingestion rejects malformed events.

tasks.prompt: Fix pruning evaluation when the target token reduction is near zero.
tasks.expected: Pruning returns no-op results for zero reduction.

tasks.prompt: Fix quality scoring threshold handling at exact boundary values.
tasks.expected: Boundary scores pass when equal to threshold.

tasks.prompt: Ensure RL routing stops cleanly when the budget has been exhausted.
tasks.expected: RL environment returns done at budget.

tasks.prompt: Fix report writing when the output directory does not exist.
tasks.expected: Report command creates parent directories.

tasks.prompt: Escape special characters in Graphviz labels.
tasks.expected: DOT export remains valid with punctuation.

tasks.prompt: Add an HTML report option next to Markdown and JSON reports.
tasks.expected: Report artifacts include an HTML summary.

tasks.prompt: Add a small LangGraph adapter that converts workflow nodes and edges.
tasks.expected: Adapter emits a graph-compatible structure.

tasks.prompt: Add a reproducible case-study runner for routing policies.
tasks.expected: Runner writes JSON, CSV, and trace artifacts.

tasks.prompt: Add a CLI path for replaying exported RL trajectories.
tasks.expected: Replay command writes final state metrics.

tasks.prompt: Expose graph transformer and edge-conditioned torch GNN architectures.
tasks.expected: Training script accepts advanced architectures.

tasks.prompt: Train a learned propagation model from trace outcomes.
tasks.expected: Learned propagation emits calibrated edge probabilities.

tasks.prompt: Improve the quickstart with analyze, optimize, simulate, and report commands.
tasks.expected: Docs include end-to-end CLI commands.

tasks.prompt: Document exact-match, human-label, rubric, and LLM judge scoring.
tasks.expected: Quality scoring docs explain all scorer modes.

tasks.prompt: Clarify the public alpha release status and benchmark limitations.
tasks.expected: Release notes mark real LLM validation as pending.

tasks.prompt: Refactor seed selector dispatch without changing benchmark results.
tasks.expected: Benchmark tests continue to pass.

tasks.prompt: Consolidate RL state key formatting across Q-learning, REINFORCE, and PPO.
tasks.expected: RL policies still train and replay.

tasks.prompt: Refactor workflow template exports while preserving fixture JSON.
tasks.expected: Workflow fixtures remain stable.
